login.title: BH Bank Energy Platform
login.subtitle: Sign in to access the smart energy management dashboard.
login.footer: Secure access for authorized users only.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Your Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Securely recover access to your BH Bank energy management account.
forgotPassword.heading: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.instruction: Enter your details below to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: Your password has been reset successfully.

error.invalidCaptcha: Incorrect captcha answer. Please try again.
error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error.generic: Password reset failed. Please try again later.

dashboard.title: Energy Management Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome to the BH Bank smart monitoring platform.
dashboard.notificationMessagesDisabled: Notification messages are disabled in Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage platform preferences and user configuration.
settings.notificationsHelp: Email alerts for high energy usage and sensor issues.
settings.notificationSoundHelp: Choose whether alert notifications play a sound.
settings.themeHelp: Current interface appearance for the platform dashboard.
settings.temperatureUnitHelp: Choose how temperatures are displayed across the platform.
settings.autoRefreshDataHelp: Choose how often dashboard and sensor data refresh.
settings.securityHelp: Update password and manage account access settings.

sensors.title: Sensors Monitoring
sensors.subtitle: Track temperature, clients count, and AC mode across BH Bank agencies.
sensors.tableSubtitle: Showing the latest 20 matching readings. Refresh timing follows Settings.

status.waitingForApply: Select a date range, then apply filters.

errors.selectAgency: Please select an agency before applying.
errors.selectDateRange: Please select both From and To dates before applying.
errors.invalidDateRange: The From date must be before or equal to the To date.
errors.dateOutOfRange: Please select dates between January 1, 2025 and April 30, 2026.

energyUsage.title: Energy Usage Overview
energyUsage.subtitle: Monitor energy consumption and optimization across BH Bank agencies.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.subtitle: Review operational summaries and energy performance reports for BH Bank agencies.
reports.exportNoData: No report data to export for {{year}}.
reports.noReports: No reports found for this year.

compareAgencies.title: Agency Energy Comparison
compareAgencies.subtitle: Compare energy consumption between two agencies in the same region.
compareAgencies.noDominantCause: No dominant cause detected for the selected period.
compareAgencies.noInsights: No insights available for this comparison.

causeMessages.AC usage: The higher-consuming agency used AC in ON mode more frequently, increasing cooling demand.
causeMessages.Client traffic: The higher-consuming agency had more client traffic, increasing cooling, lighting, and equipment usage.
causeMessages.Temperature: The higher-consuming agency recorded higher temperatures, causing stronger or more frequent AC operation.
causeMessages.Energy efficiency: The higher-consuming agency used more energy per client, suggesting lower operational efficiency.
causeMessages.After-hours usage: The higher-consuming agency used more energy outside business hours, which may indicate unnecessary equipment or AC operation after closing.
causeMessages.Peak load: The higher-consuming agency had stronger short-term load peaks.
causeMessages.Overall load: The energy difference appears to come from several small combined operational factors.
causeMessages.Energy balance: Both agencies have very similar total energy consumption for the selected period.

recommendationText.acSchedule: Review AC scheduling during business hours and avoid unnecessary ON mode usage.
recommendationText.afterHours: Check whether AC, lighting, or office equipment remains ON after closing.
recommendationText.insulation: Inspect insulation, sun exposure, and cooling efficiency for the higher-consuming agency.
recommendationText.efficiency: Monitor energy per client ratio over the next month and compare operating procedures.
recommendationText.traffic: Adjust cooling schedules to match peak client traffic periods instead of running at full load all day.
recommendationText.peakLoad: Investigate peak-load hours and stagger high-consumption equipment when possible.
recommendationText.policies: Compare equipment usage policies between agencies and document operational differences.
recommendationText.generateData: Generate or select a period with sensor readings before comparing agencies.
recommendationText.monitor: Continue monitoring energy per client and AC usage to detect future deviations.

insightMessages.temperature: {{higher}} has a higher average temperature ({{higherTemp}}°C vs {{lowerTemp}}°C), which may require more energy for cooling.
insightMessages.clients: {{higher}} serves {{diff}} more clients ({{percent}}% more), which typically increases energy consumption.
insightMessages.acMode: {{higher}} runs AC in ON mode more frequently ({{higherPercent}}% vs {{lowerPercent}}%), consuming significantly more energy.
insightMessages.efficiency: {{higher}} consumes {{percent}}% more energy per client ({{higherValue}} vs {{lowerValue}}), suggesting lower efficiency.
insightMessages.general: Both agencies have similar energy profiles.

aiDetector.title: AI Occupancy Detector
aiDetector.subtitle: This module analyzes schematic agency images to detect clients and employees per zone.
aiDetector.dailyExplanation: Select an agency and one business day to generate hourly images from 08:00 to 17:00 and analyze occupancy with computer vision.
aiDetector.dailyWarning: Daily analysis generates 10 hourly images and usually takes only a few seconds.
aiDetector.dailyEmptyState: Select an agency and day, then run daily analysis.
aiDetector.dailyErrorState: Daily AI analysis failed. Please choose a business day and try again.
aiDetector.dailyPeakExplanation: This image is the busiest hour detected for the selected day.
aiDetector.dailyResultGuide: Below you can review zone averages and inspect each hourly image. Click any image to enlarge it.
aiDetector.dailySuccessMessage: Daily AI occupancy analysis completed successfully.
aiDetector.operationalNotesSubtitle: Rule-based recommendations from the detected daily occupancy pattern.
aiDetector.dailyHourlyImagesSubtitle: Each card represents one business hour from 08:00 to 17:00. The busiest hour is highlighted.
aiDetector.emptyState: Click Run Detection to analyze an agency image.
aiDetector.errorState: AI detection failed. Please try again.
aiDetector.monthlyExplanation: Optional: summarize the selected agency and month after reviewing the daily view.
aiDetector.monthlyOverviewSubtitle: A clear summary of client flow, staffing, peak pressure, and the most crowded zones for the selected month.
aiDetector.zoneAveragesSubtitle: Average detected clients per zone across business hours.
aiDetector.zoneTotalsSubtitle: Total detected client flow per zone for the selected month.
aiDetector.crowdedPreviewSubtitle: Hours with 18 or more clients, showing the busiest zone for each moment.
aiDetector.monthlyWarning: Monthly image generation may take a few seconds.
aiDetector.monthlySecondaryNote: Uses the selected agency and month above. Daily analysis remains the main inspection view.
aiDetector.agenciesError: Could not load agencies. Please refresh or log in again.
aiDetector.peakImageExplanation: This first image is the hour with the highest detected client count for the selected month.
aiDetector.monthlyResultGuide: Scroll down to review zone averages, crowded hours, and the full hourly image gallery.
aiDetector.crowdedHoursSubtitle: Top 10 hours where at least one zone reached crowded occupancy.
aiDetector.noCrowdedHours: No crowded hours detected for this month.
aiDetector.hourlyImagesSubtitle: These are all generated images for the month, grouped by business day. Open the gallery when you want to inspect every hour.

recommendationMessages.staffing: Peak client flow may require additional staff during busy periods.
recommendationMessages.ac_control: Adjust AC mode according to occupancy to keep comfort while avoiding waste.
recommendationMessages.zone_crowding: Monitor the busiest zone and redistribute waiting queues when needed.
recommendationMessages.energy_optimization: Use low-occupancy periods to reduce AC intensity and optimize energy.

notreReseau.heroDescription: At BH Bank, each agency embodies our commitment to customer service, while offering a dynamic and constantly evolving environment.
notreReseau.finderSubtitle: Select your region to refine your search

footer.description: BH Bank, your financial partner for tailored solutions and quality service. Toward new perspectives.
